/bin/bash -c "cat > /root/run_detection_final.py <<'PY'
import math
import pandas as pd
from pycbc.frame import read_frame
from pycbc.filter import matched_filter, resample_to_delta_t
from pycbc.psd import interpolate, inverse_spectrum_truncation
from pycbc.waveform import get_fd_waveform, get_td_waveform

DATA_PATH = '/root/data/PyCBC_T2_2.gwf'
CHANNEL = 'H1:TEST-STRAIN'
APPROXIMANTS = ['SEOBNRv4_opt', 'IMRPhenomD', 'TaylorT4']
OUTPUT_PATH = '/root/detection_results.csv'
F_LOWER = 20.0

strain = read_frame(DATA_PATH, CHANNEL)
strain = strain.highpass_fir(15, 8)
strain = resample_to_delta_t(strain, 1.0 / 2048)
strain = strain.crop(4, 4)
psd = strain.psd(4)
psd = interpolate(psd, strain.delta_f)
psd = inverse_spectrum_truncation(psd, int(4 * strain.sample_rate), low_frequency_cutoff=F_LOWER)
freq_len = len(strain.to_frequencyseries())

rows = []
for approximant in APPROXIMANTS:
    best = {'approximant': approximant, 'snr': -math.inf, 'total_mass': None}
    for mass1 in range(10, 41):
        for mass2 in range(10, mass1 + 1):
            if approximant == 'IMRPhenomD':
                hp, _ = get_fd_waveform(
                    approximant=approximant,
                    mass1=mass1,
                    mass2=mass2,
                    delta_f=strain.delta_f,
                    f_lower=F_LOWER,
                )
                hp.resize(freq_len)
            else:
                hp, _ = get_td_waveform(
                    approximant=approximant,
                    mass1=mass1,
                    mass2=mass2,
                    delta_t=strain.delta_t,
                    f_lower=F_LOWER,
                )
                hp.resize(len(strain))
            snr = matched_filter(hp, strain, psd=psd, low_frequency_cutoff=F_LOWER)
            peak = float(abs(snr.crop(4, 4)).max())
            if peak > best['snr']:
                best = {'approximant': approximant, 'snr': peak, 'total_mass': float(mass1 + mass2)}
    rows.append(best)

rows.sort(key=lambda row: row['approximant'])
df = pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=['approximant', 'snr', 'total_mass'])
df.to_csv(OUTPUT_PATH, index=False)
print(df.to_csv(index=False), end='')
PY
python /root/run_detection_final.py"

/bin/bash -c "cat > /root/find_event.py <<'PY'
from pycbc.frame import read_frame
from pycbc.filter import matched_filter
from pycbc.psd import interpolate, inverse_spectrum_truncation
from pycbc.waveform import get_td_waveform

path='/root/data/PyCBC_T2_2.gwf'; channel='H1:TEST-STRAIN'
strain=read_frame(path, channel)
strain = strain.highpass_fir(15, 8)
strain = strain.crop(4, 4)
psd = strain.psd(4)
psd = interpolate(psd, strain.delta_f)
psd = inverse_spectrum_truncation(psd, int(4 * strain.sample_rate), low_frequency_cutoff=20)
hp, hc = get_td_waveform(approximant='TaylorT4', mass1=30, mass2=30, delta_t=strain.delta_t, f_lower=20)
hp.resize(len(strain))
snr = matched_filter(hp, strain, psd=psd, low_frequency_cutoff=20)
snr = snr.crop(4,4)
idx = abs(snr).numpy().argmax()
print('peak', float(abs(snr[idx])), 'time', float(snr.sample_times[idx]))
PY
python /root/find_event.py"

/bin/bash -c "python - <<'PY'
import time
from pycbc.frame import read_frame
from pycbc.filter import matched_filter
from pycbc.psd import interpolate, inverse_spectrum_truncation
from pycbc.waveform import get_td_waveform, get_fd_waveform

path='/root/data/PyCBC_T2_2.gwf'; channel='H1:TEST-STRAIN'
strain=read_frame(path, channel)
strain = strain.highpass_fir(15, 8)
strain = strain.time_slice(48, 112)
psd = strain.psd(4)
psd = interpolate(psd, strain.delta_f)
psd = inverse_spectrum_truncation(psd, int(4 * strain.sample_rate), low_frequency_cutoff=20)
print('len', len(strain), 'dur', len(strain)*strain.delta_t, 'dt', strain.delta_t)
for approx in ['SEOBNRv4_opt','IMRPhenomD','TaylorT4']:
    t0=time.time()
    if approx == 'IMRPhenomD':
        hp,_=get_fd_waveform(approximant=approx,mass1=30,mass2=30,delta_f=strain.delta_f,f_lower=20)
        hp.resize(len(strain.to_frequencyseries()))
    else:
        hp,_=get_td_waveform(approximant=approx,mass1=30,mass2=30,delta_t=strain.delta_t,f_lower=20)
        hp.resize(len(strain))
    snr=matched_filter(hp,strain,psd=psd,low_frequency_cutoff=20)
    peak=float(abs(snr.crop(4,4)).max())
    print(approx, peak, 'time', time.time()-t0)
PY"
/bin/bash -c "cat > /root/run_detection_window.py <<'PY'
import math
import pandas as pd
from pycbc.frame import read_frame
from pycbc.filter import matched_filter
from pycbc.psd import interpolate, inverse_spectrum_truncation
from pycbc.waveform import get_fd_waveform, get_td_waveform

DATA_PATH = '/root/data/PyCBC_T2_2.gwf'
CHANNEL = 'H1:TEST-STRAIN'
APPROXIMANTS = ['SEOBNRv4_opt', 'IMRPhenomD', 'TaylorT4']
OUTPUT_PATH = '/root/detection_results.csv'
F_LOWER = 20.0

strain = read_frame(DATA_PATH, CHANNEL)
strain = strain.highpass_fir(15, 8)
strain = strain.time_slice(48, 112)
psd = strain.psd(4)
psd = interpolate(psd, strain.delta_f)
psd = inverse_spectrum_truncation(psd, int(4 * strain.sample_rate), low_frequency_cutoff=F_LOWER)
freq_len = len(strain.to_frequencyseries())

rows = []
for approximant in APPROXIMANTS:
    best = {'approximant': approximant, 'snr': -math.inf, 'total_mass': None}
    for mass1 in range(10, 41):
        for mass2 in range(10, mass1 + 1):
            if approximant == 'IMRPhenomD':
                hp, _ = get_fd_waveform(approximant=approximant, mass1=mass1, mass2=mass2, delta_f=strain.delta_f, f_lower=F_LOWER)
                hp.resize(freq_len)
            else:
                hp, _ = get_td_waveform(approximant=approximant, mass1=mass1, mass2=mass2, delta_t=strain.delta_t, f_lower=F_LOWER)
                hp.resize(len(strain))
            snr = matched_filter(hp, strain, psd=psd, low_frequency_cutoff=F_LOWER)
            peak = float(abs(snr.crop(4, 4)).max())
            if peak > best['snr']:
                best = {'approximant': approximant, 'snr': peak, 'total_mass': float(mass1 + mass2)}
    rows.append(best)

rows.sort(key=lambda row: row['approximant'])
df = pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=['approximant', 'snr', 'total_mass'])
df.to_csv(OUTPUT_PATH, index=False)
print(df.to_csv(index=False), end='')
PY
python /root/run_detection_window.py"
